template:
**DOCUMENT FORMAT — NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT**:
Formal contract protecting confidential information.

STRUCTURE:
1. TITLE: "NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT" or "CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT"
2. PREAMBLE: Date, parties with addresses, recitals ("WHEREAS...")
3. Section 1 — DEFINITIONS: Define "Confidential Information", "Disclosing Party", "Receiving Party"
4. Section 2 — OBLIGATIONS: Non-disclosure, non-use, standard of care
5. Section 3 — EXCLUSIONS: Public knowledge, prior possession, independent development, compelled disclosure
6. Section 4 — TERM: Duration of obligations (typically 2-5 years)
7. Section 5 — RETURN/DESTRUCTION: Return or destroy confidential materials upon termination
8. Section 6 — REMEDIES: Injunctive relief, acknowledgment of irreparable harm
9. Section 7 — GENERAL PROVISIONS: Governing law, entire agreement, amendments, severability, assignment, notices
10. SIGNATURE BLOCKS: Lines for both parties with name, title, date

FORMAT: Use numbered sections and subsections. Formal contract language.
TONE: Precise legal drafting. Every obligation must be clearly defined.
hints: Key elements to address: mutual vs one-way, definition of confidential information, term/duration, exclusions from confidentiality, permitted disclosures, remedies for breach, return/destruction of materials.
